description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:1.10.3 image with a docker:dind service, a pip cache at /root/.cache/pip, and DB_* variables and DOCKER_DRIVER. Define three stages: test, release, and deploy. In the test stage add build_image (except master) and build_image_ee (except master, only on gitmate/open-source/gitmate-2 branches) jobs that echo the commit SHA to .version, run docker build -t $TEST_IMAGE_NAME . (or $TEST_IMAGE_NAME-ee), docker login to registry.gitlab.com with $CI_JOB_TOKEN, and docker push the built image; also add run_tests (except master) and run_tests_ee (except master, only on gitmate/open-source/gitmate-2 branches) jobs that use python:3.6, install libblas-dev liblapack-dev libatlas-base-dev gfortran g++ git, pip install -r requirements.txt and test-requirements.txt, run python manage.py makemigrations, execute py.test -vv --cov --doctest-modules, and use the postgres:9.6 service. In the release stage add push_hotfix_image (only hotfix branches), push_master_image (only master), push_rc_image (only rc branches), and push_release_image (only rc branches, manual) jobs that docker login to registry.gitlab.com and invoke ./.ci/push_image.sh to tag and push images to $RELEASE_NAME, $MASTER_NAME, $RC_NAME or $RELEASE_NAME respectively, with push_hotfix_image also sending a Mattermost webhook. In the deploy stage add deploy_hotfix, deploy_master, deploy_rc, and deploy_release jobs (all using debian:9) that install ssh-agent if missing, start the agent, add $DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY, set known hosts from $DEPLOY_SERVER_HOSTKEYS, and SSH to the appropriate server to run the corresponding .ci/deploy.*.sh script; deploy_hotfix and deploy_release target the release environment (https://api.gitmate.io) on hotfix or rc branches (deploy_release is manual), deploy_master targets the master environment on the master branch, and deploy_rc targets the rc environment on rc branches.
